dossier.noOrigin: This lot's lineage doesn't reach a harvested plot, so its origin can't yet be substantiated. Link the source lots' harvests to place it under EUDR due diligence.
dossier.footnote: Geolocation + deforestation-free declaration per plot of production (EU Regulation 2023/1115).
